title: Easter's Delight
description: A cute add-on for Farmer's Delight adding a new Bunny villager, placeable easter eggs and easter-themed foods!
body: ## About **Easter's Delight** is a cute add-on for Farmer's Delight that lets players paint and decorate boiled eggs using dyes and patterns! **I'm still actively developing this mod, so stay tuned for more features!** [Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/zHYkT85E6p) **to follow the development process and get exclusive sneak peeks!** 🐔 Got ideas or found a bug? Share your feedback and help **Easter's Delight** grow! ## Features ### 🥚 Boiled & Sliced Eggs Cook your eggs in a **Cooking Pot** to get a **Boiled Egg**. Boiled eggs can be eaten or sliced into two **Egg Slice** using a knife. ### 🖌️ Egg Painting With a splash of dye and a swirl of paint, turn your boiled eggs into works of art! Either dye them in a single color using the crafting table, or use the new **Egg Painter** and begin your journey as an egg artist. Place your dyed eggs in the world and hide them for other players to find. ### 🐰 Egg Bunny The local villagers have started a new tradition! Place down an **Egg Painter**, and one of your villagers will dress up as the **Egg Bunny**! They like to hand out unique patterns for egg painting, and will also trade dyed eggs with you. ## My other mods [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ecede4d7053895d6f424894b35007d35a5b883b.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight) Check out my popular Farmer's Delight add-on, Rustic Delight! This mod adds Cotton, Coffee, Bell Peppers, fried foods and more! Or check out Rustic Pancakes, adding decorative (and edible!) pancakes to your Minecraft world. ## Support If you like my mod and want to support me on my Minecraft modding journey, consider ☕ [buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/phantomwing)!
